title: Adrenaline
description: 🔥 Get powerful buffs when your health is low, and kill an enemy to avoid a penalty!
body:
# ⚡ Adrenaline
**Risk vs. Reward Combat | Clutch Moments | Dynamic Gameplay**

Turn the tide of battle with **Adrenaline**—a lightweight, high-performance combat plugin for **Paper, Purpur, and Folia (1.21+)**.

![Risk vs Reward](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9MiAUZX4/images/1e8f354fda24f58d81d46a9c266b5f20c7082e03.png)

## 🔥 How It Works
Adrenaline introduces a thrilling new loop to PvP and PvE combat.

1.  **THE RUSH:** When your health drops below **20%** (configurable), you instantly enter an **Adrenaline Rush**. You gain **Speed**, **Resistance**, and **Regeneration** to help you clutch the fight.
2.  **THE CRASH:** Power comes at a cost. When the rush ends, you enter a **Crash State** with **Slowness** and **Weakness**.
3.  **THE VICTORY:** Don't want the crash? **Kill an enemy** during your rush to trigger a **Victory Rush**! This cancels the crash penalty and keeps you in the fight.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

### 💉 NEW: Adrenaline Shot (v1.1.0)
Need a boost *before* the fight starts? Craft the new **Adrenaline Shot** to force-trigger a rush instantly!

![Adrenaline Shot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9MiAUZX4/images/bff2a25e1eaa1b944d46ab89dca064bb84dada1f.png)

* **Tactical Use:** Drink it to rush into battle or escape a trap.
* **Balanced:** Respects the exhaustion cooldown and triggers a crash afterwards.
* **Craftable:** Simple recipe (Iron Nugget, Redstone Block, Bottle) or toggleable in config.

### 📊 Comprehensive Statistics
Track your performance with the built-in GUI (`/ad stats`). See your **total rushes**, **victory rates**, **kill streaks**, and **K/D ratio** during adrenaline moments.

![Adrenaline Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9MiAUZX4/images/99969f560e1fcf490dfedb0bc166f72b789de0b8.png)

### ⚙️ 100% Configurable
Every server is unique. Adrenaline lets you customize **everything**.

![Fully Customizable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9MiAUZX4/images/0d52f6a958cd1d2c0c328f59eb44182980eb8133.png)

* **Buffs & Debuffs:** Change effects, duration, and amplifier levels.
* **Visuals:** Customize **Particle Effects** (Angry Villager, Smoke, etc.) and **Boss Bar** colors.
* **Sounds:** Enable immersive **Heartbeat** and **Breathing** sounds.
* **Balance:** Set trigger thresholds, cooldowns, and disabled worlds.

---

## 🔌 Integration & Support

* **⚡ Folia Supported:** Built from the ground up for modern, multi-threaded servers.
* **☁️ PlaceholderAPI:** Display stats in scoreboards and tab lists (`%adrenaline_state%`, `%adrenaline_cooldown%`, etc.).
* **🛡️ WorldGuard:** Optional `adrenaline` flag to disable the mechanic in spawn or safe zones.

## 📥 Installation
1.  Download the `.jar` and drop it into your `plugins` folder.
2.  (Optional) Install **PlaceholderAPI** for scoreboard support.
3.  Run `/ad reload` to generate the config.
4.  **Done!** Your players can now experience the rush.

---
